$description: Bounded Systems content tokens — canonical brand copy. The verbal half of the design system: one source of truth for words, the way tokens.json is for visuals. Surfaces (and other repos) may extend this with their own content/strings.json; the content tool merges core + per-repo. Scenarios in content/*.feature assert these are presented consistently.

tagline.$description: Primary tagline — hero / link cards / titles.

description.$value: Infrastructure for letting AI agents do real engineering work without handing them unbounded authority.

thesis.$value: Draw the boundary at the door — a scope-bounded set of capabilities an agent acts through, not the process, not the container.
